prompt: A long, narrow corridor stretches into the distance, its walls and floor showing clear signs of age and neglect. The walls are made of large, pale panels, cracked and peeling in places, revealing darker patches beneath. A row of rusty, reddish-brown metal barriers stands along the side, their surfaces weathered and corroded. The floor is a cracked, gray surface, littered with small stones and patches of green weeds pushing through the fissures. Above, the ceiling is lined with rows of fluorescent lights, casting a cool, dim glow that highlights the decay. The perspective slowly tilts downward, bringing the cracked floor and the barriers into closer focus, while the distant end of the corridor fades into a hazy, indistinct blur.
